mapper.select: SELECT FROM cs_api_resource WHERE deleted = FALSE ORDER BY service_name, controller_path, path, http_method
SELECT FROM cs_api_resource WHERE resource_code = #{resourceCode} AND deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT ar.id,ar.resource_code,ar.service_name,ar.controller_path,ar.controller_name,ar.http_method,ar.path,ar.method_name,ar.description,ar.enabled,ar.created_at,ar.updated_at,ar.deleted FROM cs_api_resource ar JOIN cs_role_resource rr ON ar.id = rr.resource_id AND rr.deleted = FALSE WHERE ar.deleted = FALSE AND rr.role_id IN #{roleId}
mapper.update: UPDATE cs_api_resource SET service_name=#{serviceName},controller_path=#{controllerPath},controller_name=#{controllerName},http_method=#{httpMethod},path=#{path},method_name=#{methodName},description=#{description},enabled=#{enabled},updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE resource_code=#{resourceCode} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE cs_role_resource SET deleted = TRUE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT resource_id FROM cs_role_resource WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = FALSE ORDER BY resource_id
